database_schema.summary: Database quan hệ PostgreSQL quản lý: Người dùng, Danh mục, Sách (có coverUrl), Phiếu mượn và Chi tiết mượn sách.
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 Category có nhiều Book. 1 User có nhiều BorrowRecord. 1 BorrowRecord có nhiều BorrowItem (mỗi item liên kết với 1 Book).

api_endpoints.explained: Login: receives email/password, returns user info + JWT token
Register: creates new user, returns user info + JWT token
Get current profile info via JWT token
List books with server-side pagination/filtering (search, category, availability)
Fetch book info from external sources by ISBN (includes coverUrl)
List all book categories with server-side pagination & search
Bulk delete categories (refused if any category contains books)
Create/List borrowing transactions with multi-book support
Process book returns and update stock/reader limits

business_rules: Strict DRY principle, no logic duplication
Shared UI components must reside in src/components/ui
API calls via axios instance with Authorization header
RBAC: Admin-only Reports and advanced management
Category Mapping for external data standardization
DataTable usage: Always use server-side pagination/search for main resource tables
Strict English UI and Toast standard
Call Number Generation: base + numeric sequence suffix (.1, .2) for duplicates
features: Dashboard: Overview of books and readers
ISBN Integration: Smart book info auto-fetch with cover preview
Book Management: Advanced DataTable with server-side pagination, filters, and bulk actions
Category Management: CRUD with bulk delete and book constraints
Generic DataTable: Reusable component for standardized tables
Borrow Management: POS-style workflow with real-time validation and multi-book transactions

patterns: Atomic UI Decomposition: Smaller components for better maintainability
Module-Based Types: Split interfaces by feature
Service Fallback: OpenLibrary as fallback for Google Books
Generic DataTable Pattern: Decoupled table UI from data fetching logic
useDataTable Hook: Centralized state for server-side table operations
gotchas: TypeScript v5.5+: Avoid Enums, use 'const object + type' or 'import type' for external libs
Vite ESM: Must use 'import type' for @tanstack/react-table types to avoid SyntaxError
Prisma DB Connection: Restart server after .env changes
Prisma Relations: Use 'connect' syntax for categoryId mapping during create/update
conventions: English Localization for all UI and code comments
